flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Oklahoma Baptist University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.3k vs 1.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oklahoma Baptist University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.0k → $35.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oklahoma Baptist University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.0k → $35.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oklahoma Baptist University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
